info.title: Sun-over-HTTP API
info.description:
HTTP service that returns solar position data (sunrise, sunset, twilights, solar noon, and sun angles) for any location on Earth.

All times are returned in the timezone specified by the `timezone` field (IANA format). If no timezone is provided, UTC is used.

post.summary: Get solar data for a given location and time
post.description: Accepts a JSON body describing the observer location and optional time. Returns sunrise, sunset, solar noon, twilight times, sun angles, and the instantaneous sun position at the requested timestamp. All times are expressed in the requested timezone (default: UTC).

200.description: Solar data for the requested location and time.

400.description: Bad request — missing or invalid field.

405.description: Method not allowed — only POST is accepted.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name of the observer's location. Used for all output times (default: UTC).

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC epoch). Determines both the target day and the instantaneous position. Defaults to current time when omitted.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for output times.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of UTC midnight of the target local date (seconds since epoch).

date.description: Target date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the requested timezone.

sunrise.description: Sunrise time (HH:MM:SS). Empty string during polar night.

sunset.description: Sunset time (HH:MM:SS). Empty string during polar day.

solar_noon.description: Solar noon — time of maximum sun elevation (HH:MM:SS).

day_length.description: Day length (HH:MM:SS). '00:00:00' for polar night, '24:00:00' for polar day.

civil_twilight_begin.description: Civil twilight start — sun 6° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

nautical_twilight_begin.description: Nautical twilight start — sun 12° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

astronomical_twilight_begin.description: Astronomical twilight start — sun 18° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

sunrise_azimuth_deg.description: Sunrise azimuth from north, clockwise (°). 0 when no sunrise.

sunset_azimuth_deg.description: Sunset azimuth from north, clockwise (°). 0 when no sunset.

noon_elevation_deg.description: Sun elevation at solar noon (°). Negative during polar night.

noon_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at solar noon — 180 (south) or 0 (north).

polar_day.description: True when the sun does not set (midnight sun).

polar_night.description: True when the sun does not rise.

current_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at the queried timestamp, clockwise from north (°).

current_elevation_deg.description: Sun elevation at the queried timestamp (°). Negative when below horizon.

current_time_local.description: Local time at the queried timestamp (HH:MM:SS) in the requested timezone.
